_comment: Hermes workflow definitions. Edit this file to add or change workflows. Do not edit runner.py.

steps.task: MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute SO-00 (Workflow Pre-Flight Verifier) — invoke DI-12: Aggregate Data Query Tool on the study package data files (RTSM actuals, CTMS plan, ERP inventory, study config). Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.

Validate the study package, score data quality, and route the workflow. Output a routing decision: include SIGNIFICANT_DELTA in your output if demand delta meets or exceeds the configured threshold, or MINOR_DELTA if below. Include HALT if validation fails.
Parse RTSM actuals and CTMS plan data. Calculate demand deltas by item and country. Compare to baseline. Apply scenario analysis if SIGNIFICANT_DELTA was signalled.
Generate the Demand Refresh Summary report based on all prior agent outputs.

MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute SO-00 (Workflow Pre-Flight Verifier) — invoke DI-12: Aggregate Data Query Tool on the study package data files (RTSM actuals, CTMS plan, ERP inventory, study config). Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.
Validate the study package and route the workflow to Supply Plan Generation. Output HALT if validation fails.
Load ERP inventory, supply network config, and policies. Calculate stock position, weeks of supply, safety stock status, and reorder needs. Determine order quantities.
Plan shipments: shipping windows, vendor selection, lead times, routing. All constraints must be respected.
Validate shelf-life compliance and label requirements for all planned shipments. Flag non-compliant items (advisory — do not halt).
Generate the Supply Plan report, plan scorecard, and shipping requests based on all prior agent outputs.

MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute SO-00 (Workflow Pre-Flight Verifier) — invoke DI-12: Aggregate Data Query Tool on the study package data files (RTSM actuals, CTMS plan, ERP inventory, study config). Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.
Validate the study package and route the workflow. Confirm a protocol amendment is the trigger.
Assess the protocol amendment impact across demand, supply, labelling, and regulatory areas. Signal DEMAND_CHANGE if demand is affected. Signal INVENTORY_CHANGE if existing inventory is affected.
Re-calculate demand based on amended protocol. Include only if DEMAND_CHANGE was signalled.
Re-assess inventory position under amended protocol. Include only if INVENTORY_CHANGE was signalled.
Generate the Protocol Amendment Impact Report.

MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute SO-00 (Workflow Pre-Flight Verifier) — invoke DI-12: Aggregate Data Query Tool on the study package data files (RTSM actuals, CTMS plan, ERP inventory, study config). Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.
Validate the study package and route the workflow to Routine Monitoring. This is a read-only, non-blocking workflow.
Assess current stock position across all sites and depots. Flag any sites below safety stock.
Check pending shipments, lead time adherence, and any logistics issues.
Check current demand trend against forecast. Flag any unexpected changes.
Analyse all agent inputs. Score risk by site and item. Detect hot spots, anomalies, and shortage probability. Signal CRITICAL_HOTSPOT if escalation is warranted.
Generate the Routine Monitoring alert or all-clear summary.

MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute SO-00 (Workflow Pre-Flight Verifier) — invoke DI-12: Aggregate Data Query Tool on the study package data files (RTSM actuals, CTMS plan, ERP inventory, study config). Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.
Validate the study package and confirm human approval of the supply plan is the trigger for execution.
Verify current stock position. Flag any material changes since the plan was generated. Signal MATERIAL_CHANGE if re-planning is needed.
Run hard-gate compliance checks on each planned shipment. Signal NON_COMPLIANT for any shipment that fails — those shipments are blocked. Compliant shipments proceed.
Confirm lead times, vendor availability, and shipping windows. Generate final shipping requests and tracking references.
Generate the Execution Confirmation report and shipping request package.
